# Project memory for SPP-MCP

- The app is running locally and is exposed to the internet via NGROK:
  - Ngrok public URL: `https://drearily-anime-wrench.ngrok-free.dev` → forwards to `http://localhost:3030`
  - User account for ngrok: reginaldo.santos@redspace.com (Plan: Free)
  - Web interface available at `http://127.0.0.1:4040`
- Use this ngrok URL to give agents and users access to the API endpoints from external/internet environments.
- When documenting or sharing links for real agent/client consumption, always use the ngrok forwarding address.
- The base endpoint for the API as seen by external agents/users is:
  https://drearily-anime-wrench.ngrok-free.dev
